posts.text: .@grok この画像の髪色をピンクに変えて

image_prompt.prompt: Ultra photorealistic photo of a young Japanese woman in her early 20s sitting at a charming outdoor cafe table during a warm spring lunchtime. She has long straight black hair draped smoothly over both shoulders with a soft center part, catching the midday sunlight. Fair porcelain skin with a natural dewy glow, smooth with delicate features and almond-shaped eyes. Natural Korean-style makeup with defined soft brows, subtle peach eyeshadow, light mascara, glass-skin finish, and a soft coral lip tint. Hourglass figure with large full chest, slim waist, and wide full hips visible through her outfit. She wears a fitted cream-colored ribbed knit cardigan with small pearl buttons, slightly unbuttoned at the top revealing a delicate gold necklace, paired with a light beige pleated mini skirt. She sits with her legs crossed, leaning slightly forward on the cafe table with both hands wrapped around a ceramic latte cup, elbows resting lightly on the table edge. She looks directly at the camera with a warm inviting smile, soft eyes, head tilted gently to the left. The cafe has a rustic wooden table and a woven rattan chair, pale pink cherry blossom trees visible in soft focus behind her, a small potted plant on the table, and warm-toned brick building facade across the quiet street. Bright natural midday spring sunlight from above and slightly behind creates soft even illumination on her face, gentle highlights on her hair, and dappled tree shadows on the table surface. Warm cream, soft pink cherry blossom, natural green, light gold color palette. Spring cafe lifestyle aesthetic. Third-person shot at eye-level, medium shot from waist up, centered composition. Photorealistic, high quality, high resolution, 4:5 aspect ratio.
image_prompt.negative_prompt: blurry, low quality, low resolution, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, extra limbs, distorted face, bad anatomy, deformed hands, extra fingers, cartoon, illustration, CGI, painting, anime, sketch, plastic skin, airbrushed texture, skin smoothing, beautification filters, anatomy normalization, body proportion averaging, aesthetic proportion correction

posts.notes: A/B test variant A: single-image transformation request. Hair color change is visually striking for Grok transformation. Spring cafe scene provides warm, inviting base.

posts.text: 今日も一日おつかれさま♡ 頑張った自分にたっぷりご褒美あげてね✨

image_prompt.prompt: Ultra photorealistic photo of a young Japanese woman in her early 20s sitting casually on an unmade bed in a cozy modern apartment bedroom at evening. She has long straight dark brown hair falling softly over one shoulder with a few loose strands framing her face. Fair porcelain skin with a natural warm glow from the lamp light, smooth with delicate features and almond-shaped eyes. Natural Korean-style makeup with defined soft brows, subtle brown eyeshadow, light mascara, dewy glass-skin finish, and a soft peach lip tint. Hourglass figure with large full chest, slim waist, and wide full hips visible through her loungewear. She wears an oversized soft lavender knit sweater that hangs off one shoulder revealing a bare collarbone and thin white camisole strap, paired with comfortable light grey cotton shorts barely visible beneath the oversized sweater. She sits with her legs tucked to one side on rumpled white sheets and a chunky cream knit throw blanket, leaning back slightly on one hand, the other hand gently holding a warm mug of tea resting on her thigh. She looks at the camera with a warm intimate expression, soft sleepy eyes, gentle closed-lip smile as if greeting someone she cares about. The bedroom has warm-toned light wood furniture, a bedside table with a small brass lamp casting warm amber light, a potted succulent, a few books stacked beside the lamp, and a softly lit string of warm white fairy lights draped along the wooden headboard. Warm lamplight from the bedside creates intimate golden tones across her face and sweater, soft shadows on the far wall, and a gentle highlight on her exposed shoulder and collarbone. Warm lavender, soft cream, cozy amber gold, muted wood brown color palette. Cozy intimate evening bedroom aesthetic. Third-person shot at eye-level, medium shot from waist up, centered composition. Photorealistic, high quality, high resolution, 4:5 aspect ratio.

posts.notes: Evening persona post. Warm greeting that builds character consistency — caring, gentle personality. Cozy bedroom setting with intimate lamp light matches the wind-down mood. 21:00 JST captures evening audience.
